allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/captains.json'\); console.log\('groups:', d.groups.length\); d.groups.forEach\(g=>{const filled=g.teams.filter\(t=>!t.pending\).length; console.log\(g.group, '— 채움', filled+'/4'\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/captains.json'\); let total=0,filled=0,dash=0; d.groups.forEach\(g=>g.teams.forEach\(t=>{total++; if\(!t.pending\){filled++; if\(t.player.club==='—'\)dash++}}\)\); console.log\('총',total,'팀 / 주장 채움',filled,'/ 클럽 미확인\(—\)',dash\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./src/data/captains.json'\); let dash=0,total=0; d.groups.forEach\(g=>g.teams.forEach\(t=>{total++; if\(t.player&&t.player.club==='—'\)dash++}\)\); console.log\('총',total,'주장 / 클럽 미확인\(—\)',dash\)")
